title: 🚨 Inter agree deal to sign Ivan Provedel as new goalkeeper from Lazio for €3m...

blocks.content: 🚨 Inter agree deal to sign Ivan Provedel as new goalkeeper from Lazio for €3m ⚫️🔵Provedel signs a three year deal and joins as backup for the Spanish goalkeeper Josep Martinez — starting next season. 🧤🇮🇹 https://t.co/MOQgSrlfUf — Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) Jun 17, 2026
